name: An Explainable Agentic System for Detection of Conversational Scams with Summary-Based Memory
content: Following the rapid progress of generative Artificial Intelligence, there is a growing threat posed by conversational scams. These scams often span over multiple weeks or months, gradually build trust and request for money or sensitive information. Existing scam-detection systems mainly focus on isolated messages, which renders them inadequate against this evolving threat. This paper extends single-message phishing detection and presents an explainable agentic system for detecting sophisticated
summary: 该研究提出了一种基于摘要的记忆式代理系统，用于检测复杂的对话欺诈，并引入了首个公共多类别基准ConScamBench-278以支持可重复评估和未来扩展。
key_insights: 论文提出了一个解释性的代理系统来检测高级的对话欺诈，该系统能够识别多个类型的欺诈行为。
研究开发了一个名为ConScamBench-278的公共多类别基准测试集，用于支持可重复评估和未来的扩展。
通过两个用户研究发现，参与者在判断可疑对话时经常感到不确定，并且在自我报告中信任、自信和对基于AI的欺诈检测的需求都有所增加。
xihe_relevance: 该系统对于曦和项目具有潜在价值，因为它提供了一个新的多类别基准测试集。
